title: One Year On, Final Answers Elusive: How Air India's Boeing Dreamliner Flight AI171 Ended In Disaster
description: One year post the tragic crash of Air India Flight AI171 from Ahmedabad, which killed 260 people, the final investigation report remains unpublished. Delays are attributed to incomplete technical examinations of the Boeing 787-8 Dreamliner’s engines. Preliminary findings revealed critical moments just before the crash, including fuel cutoff switches’ movements causing engine failures.
